creator: bsd.gaijin@gmail.com
text: I am seeing this (or similar) behavior on r333641 with sys/dev/vt rolled back to r329305 (could not get console to work without the latter). I have dropped into DDB and spa_namespace_lock is held by zfsd thread. I will be posting procstat output and pictures of the backtrace shortly. Unfortunately, I do not have serial console, so the pictures are all I got. I have induced panic from DDB, so I have a dump as well. I can upload it somewhere or make it available for download if it is of any value.
